body: I just made fresh pasta from scratch for the first time! The dough was surprisingly easy to work with.
Nice! What flour did you use? I've heard 00 flour makes a huge difference for pasta.
I used a mix of 00 flour and semolina. The semolina gives it more texture and bite.
How long did you rest the dough? I always rush that step and the pasta tears.
30 minutes wrapped in plastic wrap. It makes rolling so much easier, definitely don't skip it.
